## RFC or document

Which document are you commenting on?

- [ ] RFC-01 DELTA Core Protocol
- [ ] RFC-02 Proof of Wallet
- [ ] What DELTA Proves
- [ ] Proof of Reserves use case
- [ ] CI/CD Audit use case
- [ ] README
- [ ] Other

## Section

Please identify the section or quote the relevant line.

## Feedback type

- [ ] Ambiguous wording
- [ ] Overclaim / security boundary issue
- [ ] Missing definition
- [ ] Incorrect technical detail
- [ ] Interoperability concern
- [ ] Suggested example
- [ ] Other

## Comment

Describe your feedback.

## Suggested wording

If possible, propose replacement wording.

## Security impact

Does this affect what DELTA claims to prove?
